practiceTypeCombination.description: Do not repeat the same combination of Practice exercise types in 3 consecutive sessions.

productionTypeAlternation.description: Alternate between written and oral production in consecutive lessons.

warmUpFormat.description: Do not repeat the same warm-up format more than 2 times in a row.

competencyCoverage.description: In every 5 consecutive lessons, all 4 macro-skills must appear as primary competency at least once.

exerciseTypeCoverage.sessions20: All level-appropriate exercise types should appear at least once in a 20-session course.
exerciseTypeCoverage.sessions10: All Production types used at the level should appear at least once.

recyclingRules.trigger: Systematic errors in a previously-taught structure
recyclingRules.action: Dedicate 1-2 exercises in Practice to the structure within the current lesson context

recyclingRules.trigger: Correct in exercises but not in free production
recyclingRules.action: Create more production opportunities with that structure, not more exercises
Advance. No more dedicated time except as natural input.

recyclingRules.trigger: 5+ lessons without using a key structure for the level
recyclingRules.action: Include recycling: a sentence or two in a text, a couple of mixed exercises

validRecyclingExamples: Reviewing indefinido in a travel vocabulary lesson using past-tense sentences
Using indefinido in a B1 role-play where before it was only practiced in written exercises
lazyRecyclingExamples: Repeating the same fill-in-blank indefinido exercises from 3 lessons ago
Re-explaining regular indefinido endings at B1
